highlights: The AI landscape is seeing a surge in agentic systems, with new foundational guides and architectures enhancing trustworthiness and addressing complex challenges like memory consolidation and multi-agent reliability.

Hardware innovation continues to drive AI efficiency, highlighted by new LLM-optimized inference chips, while advanced tools for fine-tuning and enterprise security empower developers and organizations.

Major players like OpenAI are not only pushing model capabilities, exemplified by GPT-5's scientific breakthroughs and medical AI advancements, but also actively shaping ethical AI deployment and global standards.

agents.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI: From Foundations to Systems
agents.summary: A new comprehensive practitioner's guide covers building autonomous AI systems from LLM foundations, alignment, and reasoning layers to agent design patterns, inter-agent coordination, and production deployment, serving as a full-stack reference for developers.

agents.title: TRUSTMEM: Learning Trustworthy Memory Consolidation for LLM Agents with Long-Term Memory
agents.summary: Introduces TrustMem, a framework improving memory consolidation for LLM agents by verifying memory updates and optimizing behaviors, significantly reducing omissions, corruption, and hallucinations in long-term memory.

agents.title: Diagnosing and Mitigating Compounding Failures in Agentic Persuasion via Taxonomic Strategy Retrieval
agents.summary: Proposes Taxonomic Strategy RAG (TS-RAG) to prevent compounding errors in agentic persuasion by decoupling argumentative structure from content, leading to improved logical transfer and enabling lightweight agents to outperform stronger opponents.

models.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
models.summary: GPT-5 Pro demonstrated advanced reasoning capabilities by helping an immunologist solve a complex T-cell mystery, showcasing its potential for accelerating scientific discovery in high-impact research areas like cancer and autoimmune diseases.

models.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
models.summary: Google's conversational AI system, AMIE, has demonstrated performance matching primary care physicians in complex disease management, indicating a significant step towards autonomous medical AI applications.

models.title: Omni-Perception Policy Optimization for Multimodal Emotion Reasoning
models.summary: Introduces OPPO, a reinforcement learning framework that optimizes multimodal perception in emotion-oriented Omni-MLLMs, improving the utilization of visual/acoustic/emotion cues and reducing cross-modal hallucinations for more faithful reasoning.

tools.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
tools.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduced 'Jalapeño,' a custom AI chip specifically designed for LLM inference, promising significant improvements in performance, efficiency, and scalability for AI systems.

tools.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
tools.summary: OpenAI launched new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations identify, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale, strengthening cybersecurity defenses.

tools.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
tools.summary: Details how NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel can significantly accelerate the fine-tuning of Transformer models, providing a crucial tool for developers looking to optimize their LLM deployment workflows efficiently.

companies.title: How agents are transforming work
companies.summary: OpenAI published new research demonstrating that AI agents are enabling longer, more complex tasks, expanding productivity across various roles, and highlighting their strategic vision for the future of work.

companies.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
companies.summary: Samsung Electronics has deployed ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to its global workforce, marking one of the largest enterprise AI rollouts by OpenAI and demonstrating significant corporate adoption of advanced AI tools.

companies.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
companies.summary: OpenAI is actively contributing to the development of shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through initiatives like the Appia Foundation to ensure responsible AI development.

learning.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI: From Foundations to Systems
learning.summary: A comprehensive practitioner's reference for building autonomous AI systems, covering foundational LLM architectures, alignment, reasoning layers, agent design patterns, inter-agent coordination, and production deployment, equipping builders with full-stack knowledge.

learning.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
learning.summary: IBM Research and Hugging Face offer a practical guide with 24 working examples using the lightweight CUGA harness, enabling developers to build and understand real-world agentic applications efficiently.

learning.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
learning.summary: This guide demonstrates how to effectively use Codex for managing complex, long-running projects by preserving context and orchestrating intricate workflows beyond single prompts, enhancing developer productivity for challenging tasks.
